Page 1.name: Shards
Page 1.description: Shop for buying and exchanging shards

1 Shard.description: Shards let you buy special items that can't be bought with normal coins!

Incense.description: Incense spawn a pokemon every 20 seconds for an hour!

Eggs.description: An egg will give you a random normal pokemon!

Redeem.description: You can spawn a pokemon of your choice! Keep in mind that the stats are random!
